title: Lakeside Murder Case
original_title: レイクサイド マーダーケース
overview: Three couples are staying at a lakeside cottage with their children. They want them to prepare intensely for a prestigious high school's entrance exam with the help of a private tutor. One night, one of the wives confesses to her husband that she has killed his mistress.

trailers.title: レイク・サイド・マーダーケース　予告
